_comment: ARIA — Royal League Elite Four (elite 1, Dark). A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json / the Cicada scene (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), keeping the SAME relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage_royal_elite_1 still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Geometry is REUSED VERBATIM from Cicada (leader-agnostic camera path): pull up over the challenger's shoulder, TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to the leader's face (the two z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close holds), cross high for a side profile, then drop home. Re-themed for the Warden of Shadows: soul-sand/cave/warden/soul-soil sounds sell the dark reveal, with soul_fire_flame + sculk_soul particles at the zoom. Aria has NO uuid, so particles fall back to the Cicada-style challenger-facing offset (execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7) aimed toward where the leader stands ~7 blocks ahead. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: the particle `execute` positions off the CHALLENGER'S eye toward the stage, not off the camera rig — air-verify + nudge the ^-offset and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Royal League Elite Four hall. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:soul_fire_flame ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at @s positioned ^ ^1 ^7 run particle minecraft:sculk_soul ~ ~ ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
